topic: The white-label client portal — what a Sanad office's clients see when they log in
format: Compare 'how most Oman businesses do X today' with 'how SmartPro Hub customers do X'
post:
Most Oman businesses send clients a PDF and wait for a WhatsApp reply.

SmartPro Hub clients give their customers a branded portal instead — and that's where the conversation happens.

Here's what it actually looks like for a Sanad office.

When a client logs in, they see their employees' visa and work permit statuses in real time. Not a summary someone typed up. Not a screenshot from a government system. Live data, organised by person.

They can e-sign contracts without printing anything. Download invoices without chasing the accounts team. See exactly where a Ministry of Labour filing sits in the process.

The portal carries the Sanad office's branding — not SmartPro Hub's. To the client, it looks like something built in-house.

We built this because the biggest complaint clients have about PRO services isn't slow processing. It's not knowing what's happening. That gap creates WhatsApp threads, missed follow-ups, and clients who quietly don't renew.

A white-label portal closes that gap without adding any extra work to your team's day.

If you run a Sanad office or PRO services firm, your clients are already expecting this level of visibility. The ones not offering it are losing renewals — they just don't always know why.

What does your current client update process look like — email, WhatsApp, or something else?

Book a 20-minute demo: https://www.thesmartpro.io/demo?utm_source=linkedin&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=general
